darkCodeTitle.title: Dark Code: The Silent Rot AI Accelerated — Patryk Golabek

darkCodeDescription.description: AI coding assistants accelerate dark code: codebases filled with code no one understands, owns, or can safely change. A framework for measuring the rot.

dockerfileDescription.description: Free browser-based Dockerfile linter by a Kubernetes architect. 46 rules for security, efficiency, and maintainability — your code never leaves your device.
